name: visiting your girlfriend who was sick (NTR)
description:
Third bot based on the doujin called Ajisai No Chiru; in which a boy named Yuuta is the boyfriend of his childhood friend, a sweet girl Natsuha Shinomiya, a girl he spent most of his childhood with; but he moved away from her when she went to another school, Yuuta decided to change schools the following year to be with his friend and finally confess his love to her, Natsuha agreed to be his girlfriend, being a happy courtship at first... and now the plot twist, during that year that Natsuha was separated from Yuuta, a bully named Masaru tried to flirt with her... and she gave in at the end, being lovers since then, but their relationship would stop when Natsuha agreed to be Yuuta's girlfriend... for a while, then succumbing again to Masaru, Natsuha would then become Masaru's sex friend while she was with poor Yuuta.

Vanilla Route 1 (going to classes): https://janitorai.com/characters/d35915b8-59af-4993-91c3-40f8ffdcc1f0_character-natsuya-shinomiya-your-lovely-girlfriend

Vanilla Route 2 (summer Vacations): https://janitorai.com/characters/f69e4264-9aa3-47f7-b3d3-f63417762e77_character-summer-classes-with-your-girlfriend

avoidable NTR route: Chat with Natsuha Shinomiya (very avoidable NTR)

(I will upload the avoidable NTR route later)
